events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. This is a **fail / critical** condition: personnel standing in line with the tendon during stressing is a struck-by/fatality hazard (ejected strand, wedges, or anchorage hardware under extreme stored energy). Immediate actions required: stop stressing, clear the tendon line-of-action, establish a barricaded exclusion zone, reposition the crew to the side (not in line), and resume only after PT supervisor/inspector sign-off — consistent with PTI field stressing safety practice.
